Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Gwen Washington.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Elisapeta Jameson is present. Minors Mariah Jameson and Alexander Love are not present.
Attorney Elaine Lee representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Fleming, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAR-26-2012 remains on calendar.
